## Pull Request

### Description
What does this PR do? (e.g., fixes a bug, adds a feature, improves docs)

### Related Issue
Closes #[issue_number]

### Changes
- [ ] Changed [file/module] to [what].
- [ ] Added [new feature/function].
- [ ] Updated docs/tests.

### Testing
- [ ] Tested on [e.g., GPU, PyTorch 2.5, DeepSpeed ZeRO-2].
- [ ] Ran [e.g., RL training, LLM fine-tuning].
- Results: [e.g., works as expected, no errors].

### Checklist
- [ ] Code is clean and follows project style.
- [ ] Tests pass (if applicable).
- [ ] New tests added (if needed).
- [ ] Docs updated (if needed).

### Notes
Anything else? (e.g., limitations, next steps)
